title: Roly Poly
excerpt: Ingredients 500 ml flour 10 ml baking powder 125 ml butter 2 eggs beaten 70 ml milk Pinch of salt 250 ml smooth apricot jam Syrup 500 ml boiling water 250 ml sugar 40 ml butter Method Sift the salt, flour and baking powder together and rub in the butter with your fingers until it …
html:
Ingredients

  • 500 ml flour
  • 10 ml baking powder
  • 125 ml butter
  • 2 eggs beaten
  • 70 ml milk
  • Pinch of salt
  • 250 ml smooth apricot jam

Syrup

  • 500 ml boiling water
  • 250 ml sugar
  • 40 ml butter

Method

  1. Sift the salt, flour and baking powder together and rub in the butter with your fingers until it looks like wet sand
  2. Add the eggs and just enough milk to make a stiff dough
  3. Roll the dough out long and spread jam over it. Roll it up like a Swiss roll.
  4. Cut into rings
  5. Mix the ingredients for the syrup and pour half into the bottom of an oven dish. Place the rings on the syrup. Now pour the rest of the syrup over the dough.
  6. Bake for 60 minutes at 180°C
